EYE TRACKING WHEEL CHAIR TECHNOLOGY
Developed an innovative wheelchair prototype controlled by eye movements, featuring automatic obstacle detection for
safe navigation. The project was built using Arduino and Dlib libraries, allowing precise gazebased movement control
and directional turns with motor adjustments.

Developed a peer-to-peer rental platform that enables users to rent tools, electronics, and everyday items from locals,
